name: brio-guiseppe-theme
description: Custom WordPress theme for Brio Guiseppe — hospitality web agency. CSS build pipeline with clean-css.

scripts.build:css:global: cleancss -O2 -o assets/css/dist/global.min.css assets/css/variables.css assets/css/font-icons.css assets/css/header.css assets/css/header-responsive.css assets/css/footer.css assets/css/custom.css
scripts.build:css: npm run build:css:global && npm run build:css:home

author: Brio Guiseppe
